chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْجَبْرِ وَ الْقَدَرِ وَ الْأَمْرِ بَيْنَ الْأَمْرَيْنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – The Compulsion, and the Pre-determination, and the matter is between the two matters

text: قَالَ لَهُ رَجُلٌ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَجْبَرَ اللَّهُ الْعِبَادَ عَلَى الْمَعَاصِي فَقَالَ اللَّهُ أَعْدَلُ مِنْ أَنْ يُجْبِرَهُمْ عَلَى الْمَعَاصِي ثُمَّ يُعَذِّبَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا
فَقَالَ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ فَفَوَّضَ اللَّهُ إِلَى الْعِبَادِ قَالَ فَقَالَ لَوْ فَوَّضَ إِلَيْهِمْ لَمْ يَحْصُرْهُمْ بِالْأَمْرِ وَ النَّهْيِ
فَقَالَ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ فَبَيْنَهُمَا مَنْزِلَةٌ قَالَ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ أَوْسَعُ مَا بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad, from Yunus, from a number (of people),

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘A man said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Does Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Compel the servants upon the disobedience?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is more Just that for Him<sup>azwj</sup> to Compel them upon the disobedience then Punishing them upon it’.

So he said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! So does Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Delegate to the servants?’ So He<sup>azwj</sup> Said: ‘If He<sup>azwj</sup> had Delegated to them, He<sup>azwj</sup> would not have Surrounded them with the Commands and the Prohibitions’.

So he said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! So there is a (third) status between the two?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, more extensive than what is between the sky and the earth’.
